value.reason: The cited page is a navigation/index page for the OpenAI developer documentation (specifically the Codex web/internet access page) and does not contain any substantive content about a Guardrails system for prompt-injection protection. While the left-hand navigation menu does list "Guardrails" as a section under the Agents SDK, the actual page content shown is entirely about Codex internet access and site navigation — there is no documentation of Guardrails functionality, how it works, or that it defends against prompt injection from tools or web sources. The page therefore does not document the prompt-injection protection capability as a shipped feature, and neither the label nor the description can be validated from this page's content.
